'''zobabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spadiciform|spadiciform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spadiciform|spadiciform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zobabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobabithi|zobabithi]] || [[word:zobabiji|zobabiji]] || [[word:zobabishi|zobabishi]] || [[word:zobabiki|zobabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobabuthuthu|zobabuthuthu]] || [[word:zobabujuju|zobabujuju]] || [[word:zobabushushu|zobabushushu]] || [[word:zobabukuku|zobabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobabuthu|zobabuthu]] || [[word:zobabuju|zobabuju]] || [[word:zobabushu|zobabushu]] || [[word:zobabuku|zobabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobabufthuf|zobabufthuf]] || [[word:zobabufjuf|zobabufjuf]] || [[word:zobabufshuf|zobabufshuf]] || [[word:zobabufkuf|zobabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobabethe|zobabethe]] || [[word:zobabeje|zobabeje]] || [[word:zobabeshe|zobabeshe]] || [[word:zobabeke|zobabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobabothotho|zobabothotho]] || [[word:zobabojojo|zobabojojo]] || [[word:zobaboshosho|zobaboshosho]] || [[word:zobabokoko|zobabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobabotho|zobabotho]] || [[word:zobabojo|zobabojo]] || [[word:zobabosho|zobabosho]] || [[word:zobaboko|zobaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobabofthof|zobabofthof]] || [[word:zobabofjof|zobabofjof]] || [[word:zobabofshof|zobabofshof]] || [[word:zobabofkof|zobabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfthĂŻf|zobabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfjĂŻf|zobabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfshĂŻf|zobabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfkĂŻf|zobabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zobabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zobabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zobabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zobabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfthĂŻf|zobabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfjĂŻf|zobabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfshĂŻf|zobabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfkĂŻf|zobabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfthĂŻf|zobabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfjĂŻf|zobabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfshĂŻf|zobabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zobabĂŻfkĂŻf|zobabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zobabĂŠthĂŠ|zobabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zobabĂŠjĂŠ|zobabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zobabĂŠshĂŠ|zobabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zobabĂŠkĂŠ|zobabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zobabathatha|zobabathatha]] || [[word:zobabajaja|zobabajaja]] || [[word:zobabashasha|zobabashasha]] || [[word:zobabakaka|zobabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zobabatha|zobabatha]] || [[word:zobabaja|zobabaja]] || [[word:zobabasha|zobabasha]] || [[word:zobabaka|zobabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zobabafthaf|zobabafthaf]] || [[word:zobabafjaf|zobabafjaf]] || [[word:zobabafshaf|zobabafshaf]] || [[word:zobabafkaf|zobabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zobabasha|zobabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zobabshĂ«sha|zobabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zobabrosha|zobabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zobabmusha|zobabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zobabyasha|zobabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozobabnkshĂ«sha|gozobabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozobabnkrosha|gozobabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozobabnkmusha|gozobabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozobabnkyasha|gozobabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zobababasha|zobababasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zobababshĂ«sha|zobababshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zobababrosha|zobababrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zobababmusha|zobababmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zobababyasha|zobababyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozobababnkshĂ«sha|gozobababnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozobababnkrosha|gozobababnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozobababnkmusha|gozobababnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozobababnkyasha|gozobababnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zebĂŠbasha|zebĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zebĂŠbshĂ«sha|zebĂŠbshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zebĂŠbrosha|zebĂŠbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zebĂŠbmusha|zebĂŠbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zebĂŠbyasha|zebĂŠbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozebĂŠbnkshĂ«sha|gozebĂŠbnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozebĂŠbnkrosha|gozebĂŠbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozebĂŠbnkmusha|gozebĂŠbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozebĂŠbnkyasha|gozebĂŠbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zobfabasha|zobfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zobfabshĂ«sha|zobfabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zobfabrosha|zobfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zobfabmusha|zobfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zobfabyasha|zobfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozobfabnkshĂ«sha|gozobfabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozobfabnkrosha|gozobfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozobfabnkmusha|gozobfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozobfabnkyasha|gozobfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
